message:
perf(pager): short-circuit ConcurrentPublishedPages empty-overflow clear

`PublishedPages::clear` chains `atomic.clear()` (which already skips on
`page_count == 0`) with `overflow.clear()`, but the overflow plane
unconditionally called `DashMap::clear`. On the MT8 mt-mvcc-bench shape,
overflow stays empty for a connection's lifetime — bench page numbers
stay well below the 65535-page direct-slot limit and never spill — yet
every commit / rollback / metadata-only republish under
`publish_lock` paid for a per-shard write-lock sweep through
`DashMap::clear`.

`ConcurrentPublishedPages` already maintains a `page_count: AtomicUsize`
that all publication-side mutations (insert / remove / retain /
insert_batch / clear) update. Because every one of those is serialized
by `PublishedPagerState::publish_lock`, `page_count == 0` observed
inside `clear()` exactly implies the DashMap is empty. Acquire the
counter first; on zero, return without touching the shards.

Pattern mirrors `AtomicPublishedPages::clear`'s existing short-circuit
on its own `page_count` and the recent `ShardedPageCache::clear`
shards-dirty short-circuit (commit c959fb27).

Microbench
`bench_concurrent_published_pages_clear_empty_overflow_microbench`
(`cargo test -p fsqlite-pager --lib --release -- --ignored --nocapture
bench_concurrent_published_pages_clear_empty_overflow_microbench`)
forces `page_count = 1` to defeat the new fast path on the baseline
pass and pairs both runs in one binary:

  baseline 2.92 us/clear -> optimized 1 ns/clear (~2922x)

The 0.44 % MT8 inclusive self-time the `PublishedPages::clear` symbol
held in
`tests/artifacts/perf/profiling-mt-mvcc-20260424T161631Z/perf_mt8_callgraph.txt`
was almost entirely the overflow `DashMap::clear` shard sweep — the
atomic plane was already short-circuiting on its own count.

Also drives the existing `bench_sharded_cache_clear_empty_shards_microbench`
ignore attribute through `clippy::ignore_without_reason` so
`cargo clippy -p fsqlite-pager --lib --release --tests` stays clean.

All 9 `PublishedPages` tests and 85 `page_cache::tests` pass; clippy
(pedantic + nursery, `--tests`) and `cargo fmt --all -- --check` clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
